items.question: What is a Google Business Profile sold on EkoLink?
items.answer: Our Google Business Profiles are pre-created, optimized and verified listings that you can claim and use as if you had created them yourself. They save you time and help you gain better local visibility faster.

items.question: How does buying a listing work?
items.answer: You choose a listing in our catalog, confirm your order online, then we prepare the transfer. You then receive the information needed to claim the listing step by step.

items.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept major cards via Stripe, as well as solutions like Apple Pay and Google Pay depending on your device. For some needs, a bank transfer can also be arranged on request.

items.question: How long does it take to receive my listing after purchase?
items.answer: The usual time is generally 24 to 48 business hours. In some cases it can go up to 72 hours depending on the type of listing and Google's processing pace.

items.question: How does the ownership transfer of the listing work?
items.answer: We prepare the invitation or the necessary access, then we guide you to finalize the claim. You receive clear instructions, and our team stays available if an adjustment is needed during the transfer.

items.question: Will the listing have reviews or history?
items.answer: Each listing has its own characteristics. Some have history or elements already in place, others are more recent. Important information is specified on the product page when relevant.

items.question: Can I choose the listing name after purchase?
items.answer: Yes, after claiming you can adapt the listing information in compliance with Google Business Profile rules. We always recommend an approach consistent with your real business and local area.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: We review each request case by case. If the transfer hasn't started or if a proven issue prevents the planned delivery, we find the fairest solution, which may include a replacement or a refund.

items.question: Are the listings compliant with Google's policies?
items.answer: We select and prepare our listings with special attention to compliance and quality. As Google may change its rules, we support you in using your listing under the best possible conditions.

items.question: I have other questions, how can I contact you?
items.answer: You can write to us via the contact form, by email or on WhatsApp. We get back to you quickly to help before, during or after your purchase.

faq.supportText: Our team is available to answer all your questions and support you in your project.

contact.heroLead: A question about your Google Business profile? A custom project? Our team replies within 24 business hours.

process.title: Choose a listing
process.description: Browse our catalog, use our trade, city and budget filters, then pick the Google Business profile that matches your needs.

process.title: Pay online
process.description: Pay for your order securely by card or via our payment methods. Instant confirmation and transparent process.

process.title: Receive and claim
process.description: Receive by email everything you need to claim the listing. We support you all the way to a successful transfer.

why.title: Ready-to-use listings
why.description: All our listings are already created, optimized and ready to generate traffic as soon as they're claimed.

why.title: 100% secure purchase
why.description: Payment protected by SSL and 3D Secure. Your data and transactions are 100% secure.

why.title: Human support
why.description: Our experts support you before, during and after the purchase for a stress-free transition.

why.title: Delivery within 24 to 72h
why.description: Fast and efficient transfer. Receive your listing and start growing your business.

faq.question: How long does the transfer take?
faq.answer: The transfer usually takes between 24 and 72h depending on the type of listing and Google's responsiveness. We keep you informed at every step.

faq.question: Is the listing already optimized?
faq.answer: Yes, all our listings are already local-SEO optimized with relevant categories, keywords and carefully written descriptions.

faq.question: Can I edit the information after purchase?
faq.answer: Yes, once the listing is claimed, you become its owner and can edit all the information as you wish.

faq.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept cards (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay and bank transfer on request.
